text: Title. The system does two things: temporal step segmentation and per-step compliance verification on egocentric assembly video. v2 is the current best offline configuration.

title: Build and Assembly Introduction

name: TextBox 5
text: Build and Assembly Introduction
textPreview: Build and Assembly Introduction

name: TextBox 6
text:
Scope: Research and develop an AI based system capable of detecting errors & deviations in various stages of assembly processes from first person view videos resulting in improved efficiency, higher throughput, and faster production times.

Value: Benefits the company wide effort by significantly reducing the time required of quality checks, allowing for faster production cycle and shorter lead times

Business Area: Aero

Viewpoint: Egocentric
textPreview: Scope: Research and develop an AI based system capable of detecting errors & deviations in various stages of assembly processes from firs...

name: Text 12
text: Sana Hafez (lead) . Nahom . Dhyey Vank . Ketan More
textPreview: Sana Hafez (lead) . Nahom . Dhyey Vank . Ketan More

text: Title. The system does two things: temporal step segmentation and per-step compliance verification on egocentric assembly video. v2 is the current best offline configuration.

title: The task

name: Text 0
text: The task
textPreview: The task

name: Text 1
text: Turn a long egocentric assembly video into an ordered, verified step sequence
textPreview: Turn a long egocentric assembly video into an ordered, verified step sequence

name: Text 5
text: Input
textPreview: Input

name: Text 6
text: One egocentric video of a person performing an assembly, several steps in sequence.
textPreview: One egocentric video of a person performing an assembly, several steps in sequence.

name: Text 11
text: What we output
textPreview: What we output

name: Text 12
text: Per-frame step labels collapsed into an ordered timeline, plus a correct / incorrect / missing judgment per step.
textPreview: Per-frame step labels collapsed into an ordered timeline, plus a correct / incorrect / missing judgment per step.

name: Text 13
text: step timeline + outcome + verdict
textPreview: step timeline + outcome + verdict

name: Text 17
text: Why it is hard
textPreview: Why it is hard

name: Text 18
text: Fine-grained steps, egocentric motion and hand occlusion, and only a small annotated training set.
textPreview: Fine-grained steps, egocentric motion and hand occlusion, and only a small annotated training set.

name: Text 19
text: 36 train recordings
textPreview: 36 train recordings

name: Text 20
text: The compliance angle is what makes this more than plain action segmentation: the system must catch a wrong or skipped step, not just name the current one.
textPreview: The compliance angle is what makes this more than plain action segmentation: the system must catch a wrong or skipped step, not just name...

name: Text 21
text: IndustReal — Procedure Step Recognition
textPreview: IndustReal — Procedure Step Recognition

text: Frame the problem. Emphasize the small-data reality (36 recordings) up front — it explains the accuracy ceiling later.

title: The current architecture is solving the wrong abstraction

name: Text 0
text: The current architecture is solving the wrong abstraction
textPreview: The current architecture is solving the wrong abstraction

name: Text 1
text: The largest gain will come from physical state and procedure belief—not a second giant encoder
textPreview: The largest gain will come from physical state and procedure belief—not a second giant encoder

name: Text 3
text: Root cause
textPreview: Root cause

name: Text 4
text: A frozen 1B motion encoder + clip classifier + Viterbi can segment familiar motion, but it cannot represent what part, tool or connection changed—or which branches are valid next.
textPreview: A frozen 1B motion encoder + clip classifier + Viterbi can segment familiar motion, but it cannot represent what part, tool or connection...

name: Text 5
text: Why this matters: the current v2 result is strong offline, yet the causal model drops sharply and incorrect-install recall is approximately zero.
textPreview: Why this matters: the current v2 result is strong offline, yet the causal model drops sharply and incorrect-install recall is approximate...

name: Text 6
text: Four architectural gaps
textPreview: Four architectural gaps

name: Text 10
text:
Motion is not state
The same hand motion can seat the correct part, the wrong part or nothing at all.
textPreview: Motion is not state | The same hand motion can seat the correct part, the wrong part or nothing at all.

name: Text 14
text:
Linear order is too rigid
Aerospace procedures contain optional, parallel and recovery branches.
textPreview: Linear order is too rigid | Aerospace procedures contain optional, parallel and recovery branches.

name: Text 18
text:
Closed-set outcomes miss unseen faults
A safe system must preserve an UNKNOWN / escalate decision.
textPreview: Closed-set outcomes miss unseen faults | A safe system must preserve an UNKNOWN / escalate decision.

name: Text 22
text:
No future or recovery model
Detection alone cannot return the assembly to a verified state.
textPreview: No future or recovery model | Detection alone cannot return the assembly to a verified state.

name: Text 23
text: IndustReal — Procedure Intelligence Architecture
textPreview: IndustReal — Procedure Intelligence Architecture

text: This is the honest 'why accuracy is limited' slide. The single most important line is incorrect-install recall ~0% — it is an assembly-state problem, not a segmentation problem, and it motivates both the data-collection effort and the next-step encoder.

title: Slide 14
Candidate A fits one 24 GB GPU

name: Text 0
text: Candidate A fits one 24 GB GPU
textPreview: Candidate A fits one 24 GB GPU

name: Text 1
text: Freeze/cache perception first; train compact state, temporal and graph modules
textPreview: Freeze/cache perception first; train compact state, temporal and graph modules

name: Text 4
text:
Adaptable video backbone
VideoMAEv2-B/L or V-JEPA 2.1; freeze, then tune late blocks with adapters/LoRA. 16 frames at 224p, ~0.5 s stride.
textPreview: Adaptable video backbone | VideoMAEv2-B/L or V-JEPA 2.1; freeze, then tune late blocks with adapters/LoRA. 16 frames at 224p, ~0.5 s stride.

name: Text 7
text:
State branch
Detect hands, tools, parts and targets; form a dynamic relation graph; bootstrap with CAD synthetic views and real ROIs.
textPreview: State branch | Detect hands, tools, parts and targets; form a dynamic relation graph; bootstrap with CAD synthetic views and real ROIs.

name: Text 10
text:
Streaming core
Causal FACT-lite + branching task-graph belief + state-delta tokens. Cached features keep the trainable path compact.
textPreview: Streaming core | Causal FACT-lite + branching task-graph belief + state-delta tokens. Cached features keep the trainable path compact.

name: Text 13
text:
Live outputs
Step, completion, state delta, mistake type / UNKNOWN, PNR, evidence region, uncertainty and approved recovery.
textPreview: Live outputs | Step, completion, state delta, mistake type / UNKNOWN, PNR, evidence region, uncertainty and approved recovery.

name: Text 14
text: IndustReal — Procedure Intelligence Architecture
textPreview: IndustReal — Procedure Intelligence Architecture

text: Walk the uploaded v2 diagram left to right. Key point: only the head (orange) is trained — the 1B backbone stays frozen, which is why the whole thing fine-tunes on a single 24 GB card. Viterbi is procedure-aware decoding; verification fuses the step and type heads.

title: Slide 16
Candidate B learns procedure context from unlabeled runs

name: Text 0
text: Candidate B learns procedure context from unlabeled runs
textPreview: Candidate B learns procedure context from unlabeled runs

name: Text 1
text: P-JEPA is a stronger next step than concatenating two frozen giant encoders
textPreview: P-JEPA is a stronger next step than concatenating two frozen giant encoders

name: Text 3
text: Why it helps
textPreview: Why it helps

name: Text 4
text:
Long-horizon context.
Mask and predict latent segments across complete procedures.

Label efficiency.
Pretrain on normal, partial and multi-view recordings before task supervision.

State remains explicit.
Keep the relation graph and task graph; P-JEPA supplies progress-aware context.
textPreview: Long-horizon context. | Mask and predict latent segments across complete procedures. |  | Label efficiency. | Pretrain on normal, partial...

name: Text 6
text: 24 GB: cache backbone features and train the contextualizer + heads. Multi-GPU: jointly adapt late video blocks and pretrain across views. Keep the dual-backbone concatenation only as an ablation—it adds semantics but does not solve physical state or procedure structure.
textPreview: 24 GB: cache backbone features and train the contextualizer + heads. Multi-GPU: jointly adapt late video blocks and pretrain across views...

name: Text 7
text: IndustReal — Procedure Intelligence Architecture
textPreview: IndustReal — Procedure Intelligence Architecture

text: Position the second encoder as the concrete next accuracy lever. Be precise that it is InternVideo2 (video encoder for features), not InternVL (chat VLM). Honest framing: complementary features, a modest gain, and it does not replace fixing the dataset.

title: Three candidates create a deliberate accuracy–risk ladder

name: Rectangle 14
text: Three candidates create a deliberate accuracy–risk ladder
textPreview: Three candidates create a deliberate accuracy–risk ladder

name: Rectangle 1
text: Build a deterministic specialist core first, add procedural pretraining second, and collaborate with a VLM only on sparse evidence packets.
textPreview: Build a deterministic specialist core first, add procedural pretraining second, and collaborate with a VLM only on sparse evidence packets.

name: Rectangle 6
text: StateGraph-PSR
textPreview: StateGraph-PSR

name: Rectangle 7
text:
RECOMMENDED FIRST BUILD
Strong live state tracking, branching procedure belief, explicit errors and auditable recovery.
textPreview: RECOMMENDED FIRST BUILD | Strong live state tracking, branching procedure belief, explicit errors and auditable recovery.

name: Rectangle 9
text: P-JEPA context
textPreview: P-JEPA context

name: Rectangle 10
text:
BEST RESEARCH PATH
Use unlabeled full procedures to learn progress and long-horizon context; cached-feature route fits 24 GB.
textPreview: BEST RESEARCH PATH | Use unlabeled full procedures to learn progress and long-horizon context; cached-feature route fits 24 GB.

name: Rectangle 12
text: Triggered VLM
textPreview: Triggered VLM

name: Rectangle 13
text:
SEMANTIC ADD-ON
Adjudicate uncertain or high-impact events and explain evidence; never be the sole continuous alert detector.
textPreview: SEMANTIC ADD-ON | Adjudicate uncertain or high-impact events and explain evidence; never be the sole continuous alert detector.

text: Concrete I/O. The timeline is the step head; the ✓/✗ column is the type head; the verdict fuses them. Note the example deliberately shows a caught 'incorrect' — that's the compliance value proposition, and also the exact thing that is weakest today (next slides).

title: Slide 22
Mistakes are detected by three independent residuals

name: Text 0
text: Mistakes are detected by three independent residuals
textPreview: Mistakes are detected by three independent residuals

name: Text 1
text: Procedure mismatch + normal-prototype distance + action-effect contradiction
textPreview: Procedure mismatch + normal-prototype distance + action-effect contradiction

name: Text 3
text: Why it works
textPreview: Why it works

name: Text 4
text:
Procedure residual.
Compare the observed action with every valid next action in the current task-graph belief.

Execution residual.
Compare the live segment with multiple history-conditioned normal prototypes.

Effect residual.
Contrast predicted state delta with the observed relation graph after contact.
textPreview: Procedure residual. | Compare the observed action with every valid next action in the current task-graph belief. |  | Execution residual....

name: Text 6
text: Fuse the three residuals into known type / UNKNOWN, violated semantic role, PNR, evidence ROI and confidence. Package four key moments—before, contact, PNR, effect—for human review or event-triggered VLM adjudication. This follows the structure exposed by AMNAR, EgoPED, AXG-Reasoner, MATT and action-effect modeling.
textPreview: Fuse the three residuals into known type / UNKNOWN, violated semantic role, PNR, evidence ROI and confidence. Package four key moments—be...

text: Position the second encoder as the concrete next accuracy lever. Be precise that it is InternVideo2 (video encoder for features), not InternVL (chat VLM). Honest framing: complementary features, a modest gain, and it does not replace fixing the dataset.

title: Slide 24
Recovery is constrained graph search, not free-form generation

name: Text 0
text: Recovery is constrained graph search, not free-form generation
textPreview: Recovery is constrained graph search, not free-form generation

name: Text 1
text: Predict future state in latent predicates; select only approved repair operations
textPreview: Predict future state in latent predicates; select only approved repair operations

name: Text 3
text: Guardrails
textPreview: Guardrails

name: Text 4
text:
Anticipate.
Predict valid next actions at horizons 1 / 3 / 5 and the resulting part-relation graph.

Score risk.
Estimate failure probability, uncertainty and irreversible state transitions.

Repair safely.
Search a versioned recovery graph for the shortest verified route to a valid state; escalation is always allowed.
textPreview: Anticipate. | Predict valid next actions at horizons 1 / 3 / 5 and the resulting part-relation graph. |  | Score risk. | Estimate failure...

name: Text 6
text: A VLM may phrase the approved plan, explain evidence and retrieve an expert clip. It cannot invent a repair operation. Re-run state verification after every correction and stop when evidence is uncertain, the operation is unapproved or damage is possible.
textPreview: A VLM may phrase the approved plan, explain evidence and retrieve an expert clip. It cannot invent a repair operation. Re-run state verif...

name: Text 3

Recommendation

Build Candidate A first. It is the only design that closes the loop from action → state → mistake → future → approved recovery while remaining trainable on one 24 GB GPU.
textPreview: Recommendation |  | Build Candidate A first. It is the only design that closes the loop from action → state → mistake → future → approved...

name: Text 5
text:
VLM role

Use Qwen3-VL-4B/8B in 4-bit or ProVideLLM only for event-triggered adjudication, explanation and evidence retrieval—not as the sole safety detector.

title: The experiment sequence isolates one architectural question at a time

name: Text 3
text:
Release metrics

Online F1@50 + edit; state-delta macro-F1; per-type recall; unseen-error AUROC; false alerts/hour; PNR delay; ECE / risk-coverage.
textPreview: Release metrics |  | Online F1@50 + edit; state-delta macro-F1; per-type recall; unseen-error AUROC; false alerts/hour; PNR delay; ECE / ...

name: Text 5
text:
Pilot blockers

High-impact false negatives, nuisance false alerts, uncalibrated UNKNOWN decisions, unsafe repair suggestions or p95 alert delay above the operational limit.
textPreview: Pilot blockers |  | High-impact false negatives, nuisance false alerts, uncalibrated UNKNOWN decisions, unsafe repair suggestions or p95 ...

textPreview: Add future state, approved recovery search, triggered VLM and edge profiling. Exit: safe plan + calibrated pilot candidate.

text: Close with the roadmap. Two parallel tracks: the cheap model lever (InternVideo2 concat) and the real fix (data + assembly-state perception). Reinforce the 24 GB feasibility.
